bugs.title: chiseledTest Stonecutter task does not exist
bugs.evidence: stonecutter.gradle.kts and stonecutter.gradle both define only chiseledBuild and chiseledRunGametest. No chiseledTest task is registered.
bugs.expected: ./gradlew chiseledTest invokes test task across all 5 subprojects.
bugs.suggested_fix: Add chiseledTest task to both stonecutter.gradle.kts and stonecutter.gradle mirroring the chiseledBuild pattern using ofTask("test").

bugs.title: startRiding() argument count compile error on 1.21.4 — status unclear
bugs.evidence: Wave-4-agent-1 reported a compile failure at line 223 for 1.21.4. Reading the file shows lines 222-226 ARE correctly Stonecutter-forked. Either the report was stale OR Stonecutter substitution isn't being applied to test sources. Unverified without a build run.
bugs.suggested_fix: Re-run ./gradlew chiseledBuild and ./gradlew :1.21.4:build to confirm status. If failure persists, debug Stonecutter substitution of test/gametest sources.

bugs.title: Test sources not picked up by Stonecutter — chiseledSrc/test not populated
bugs.evidence: src/test/kotlin tree exists with 5 JUnit test files but no per-version build/chiseledSrc/test directory is created. Stonecutter only processes source sets registered with it.
bugs.expected: src/test source set is registered with Stonecutter so per-version chiseledSrc/test directories are populated.
bugs.suggested_fix: Register the test source set in build.gradle.kts so Stonecutter stamps it per-version.

bugs.title: 1.20.1 SpecRegistry bootstrap failure in unit tests unverified
bugs.evidence: Wave-4-agent-3 confirmed criterion 12 partially fails: chiseledTest (1.20.1) throws SpecRegistry 'Not bootstrapped'. Wave-4-agent-1 could not verify due to compile/task blockers.
bugs.expected: SpecRegistry unit tests run on 1.20.1 without requiring MC Bootstrap.
bugs.suggested_fix: Lazy-resolve Registries.ITEM reference into a companion-object property only touched post-bootstrap, OR accept TagKey<Item> directly in bindRoleTag and move string parsing to call sites guaranteed to run post-bootstrap.

bugs.title: stonecutter.gradle.kts and stonecutter.gradle modified outside owned_files without disclosure
bugs.evidence: wave-4-agent-2's owned_files were PlayerAttackMixin.kt, CombatHooksGametest.kt, WeaponTooltipInjector.kt. The agent also wrote stonecutter.gradle.kts and stonecutter.gradle (adding chiseledRunGametest task) and listed them in files_written but NOT in files_unexpectedly_modified.
bugs.expected: files outside owned_files must be listed in files_unexpectedly_modified with reasoning in concerns.
bugs.suggested_fix: Process violation; not a code fix. The additive task registration is correct and not breaking. Note for future agent-discipline tracking.

bugs.title: PlayerAttackMixin target rewritten to Entity.hurt/hurtOrSimulate @ModifyArg — unverified at runtime
bugs.evidence: Mixin architecturally rewritten: target now @ModifyArg(index=1) on Entity.hurt (<1.21.4) / Entity.hurtOrSimulate (>=1.21.4) inside Player.attack(Entity). Plausible per static bytecode analysis but no gametest run confirms injection fires.
bugs.expected: Mixin injection fires and modifies damage on all 5 MC versions; gametests verify.
bugs.suggested_fix: Run chiseledRunGametest. Add a logger/breakpoint to confirm @ModifyArg fires. Verify on 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2.

bugs.title: chiseledRunGametest never actually executed — acceptance criterion unmet
bugs.evidence: Acceptance criterion: './gradlew chiseledRunGametest succeeds across all 5 subprojects' and 'All 9 gametests pass on all 5 versions (45 passing tests total)'. Agent explicitly states 'chiseledRunGametest was not actually run — fixes are static-bytecode-inspection-based.'
bugs.expected: chiseledRunGametest task is run and all gametests pass on all 5 versions.
bugs.suggested_fix: Run ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest. Triage and fix any runtime failures.

bugs.title: Sweep entities receive DnD modifier — potential unintended behavior
bugs.evidence: @ModifyArg on the INVOKE inside Player.attack(Entity) fires for every entity hit, including sweep targets. Spec does not explicitly state whether sweep entities should get the modifier.
bugs.expected: Determine intended behavior; if sweep should NOT get modifier, add a filter.
bugs.suggested_fix: Consult the design spec. If sweep entities should be exempt, switch to @ModifyVariable on the primary damage local, or guard the modification.

bugs.title: 26.1.2 identity mapping for mixin bytecode descriptor is novel and untested
bugs.evidence: 26.1.2 uses identity tiny v2 stub (no intermediary remapping). Mixin descriptor resolution at runtime may behave differently on this novel mapping config.
bugs.expected: Mixin works on 26.1.2 same as other versions.
bugs.suggested_fix: Smoke-test the mixin on 26.1.2 specifically. May need additional descriptor fork if behavior differs.

bugs.title: Criterion 12 unverified — build/test/gametest matrix not confirmed green
bugs.evidence: Criterion 12 requires all 5 MC versions pass chiseledBuild, chiseledTest, and chiseledRunGametest. chiseledTest task missing (P0); chiseledRunGametest not run (P1). Phase structurally present, not runtime-verified.
bugs.suggested_fix: After fixing P0 bugs (chiseledTest task, test source set), run full matrix. Iterate fixes until green.

bugs.title: phase-3-combat-hooks git tag not created
bugs.evidence: Criterion 14 requires phase tagged 'phase-3-combat-hooks'. Agent-3 is static-read-only and could not create the tag.
bugs.expected: phase-3-combat-hooks tag exists at the tip of the Phase 3 work.
bugs.suggested_fix: After full matrix is green, manually run: git tag phase-3-combat-hooks && git push --tags.

bugs.title: Uncommitted manifest.json modification and untracked logs/ directory
bugs.evidence: Working tree has a modified manifest.json and an untracked versions/1.20.1/logs/ directory.
bugs.expected: Clean tree at end of phase.
bugs.suggested_fix: Add versions/*/logs/ to .gitignore. Commit or revert manifest.json changes.
